report.summary: Third standup of Mar 29. Two full rotations complete today. BTC flat ~$66,008-$66,194 holding $66K, ETH ~$1,995 testing $2K support, F&G 10-25 (extreme fear streak 51+ days). 411 uncommitted files (Day 5 approaching). Crypto TA Guide built, 3 pages promoted, 4 OG images created, 7 UX fixes shipped, 4 tweets + newsletter v40 drafted. Deploy remains existential P0.

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: ~$66,008–$66,194 (flat from v2 standup's $66,000–$66,200). MetaMask shows $66,194 spot. Holding $66K support for 4th consecutive day. Iran tensions + oil >$100 remain primary headwinds. Whale accumulation continues — exchange reserves at 7-year lows.
ETH: ~$1,995 (slight dip from v2's $1,995–$2,024). Trading at bottom of $1,950–$2,120 weekly range. Down 60% from ATH $4,951 (Aug 2025). 24h volume $3.78B. ETH/BTC ratio ~0.030 still depressed.

F&G INDEX: Sources still diverge. CoinMarketCap shows 25 (Extreme Fear), Blockchain Magazine 12 (Mar 28), SpotedCrypto 14 (Mar 26), milkroad/alternative.me confirm extended streak. Conservative read: 10-14 baseline with spikes to 25. The 51+ day Extreme Fear streak (longest since FTX collapse) remains intact.

DELTA FROM v2 STANDUP: BTC essentially flat ($66,008 vs $66,000-$66,200). ETH slightly lower ($1,995 vs $1,995-$2,024). F&G unchanged (extreme fear persists). Uncommitted files 399→411 (+12). Page.tsx 1,230→1,231 (+1). Published slugs in working tree ~941 (stable).

sections.title: Project Manager
items: TWO FULL ROTATIONS COMPLETE TODAY: All 6 agents ran twice since midnight. This standup is the start of rotation 3. 12 agent runs today (including this one).

WHAT SHIPPED SINCE v2 STANDUP: (1) BUILD v2: Crypto Technical Analysis Guide 2026 (~3,500 words, 6 FAQs, 11 sections covering RSI/MACD/Bollinger/MA/Volume Profile/Fibonacci, JSON-LD structured data). (2) PUBLISH: Promoted cross-chain-intents-guide (total 3 pages promoted today). (3) DESIGN v2: 4 OG images (TA guide, Telegram mini-apps, tariffs trade war, onchain forex), 7 UX fixes (touch targets, aria-labels, mobile table scroll, BackToTop), 3 pages audited. (4) COMMUNITY v2: 4 tweets (#239-242: Q1 close thread, whale squeeze, CLARITY Act, 604-page milestone), newsletter v40, SVG social card. (5) EOD v2: Full QA pass — 145 TS errors stable, no regressions, 6/6 API routes healthy on disk.

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS (UNCHANGED): (1) P0 CRITICAL — 411 uncommitted files, HEAD at 21aaf5b since Mar 25 (approaching Day 5). (2) P1 — 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items blocked (wallet-security slug mismatch, restaking missing page.tsx). (3) P2 — 105 legacy slugs missing page.tsx (~82% coverage). (4) P3 — 145 TS errors (non-blocking, stable). (5) P3 — CoinGecko free tier rate limit risk.
GIT STATUS: 411 files pending (+12 from v2). 31 files changed, 988 insertions, 595 deletions. All additive — no conflict risk. TA guide + 4 OG images + UX fixes all in working tree.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY [DAY 5 APPROACHING, EXISTENTIAL]: 411 uncommitted files. Every hour = lost indexing time for 77+ new published slugs, 12+ learn pages, TA guide, UX fixes, 4 OG images — all invisible to Google. Jefe action needed: `git add -A && git commit -m 'batch deploy' && git push`. 5-minute highest-leverage action. This has been P0 for 3 consecutive standups.

PRIORITY 2 — Q1 CLOSE CONTENT (TOMORROW IS LAST TRADING DAY): Mar 30 = last trading day of Q1 2026. BTC -24.6% YTD, ETH -60%, SOL -72% — worst Q1 since 2022. Community has 4 tweets queued (#239-242) including Q1 close thread. Build cycle should produce dedicated Q1 retrospective page. This is a time-sensitive content moment — every hour of delay = missed SEO opportunity.

PRIORITY 3 — UNBLOCK 2 QUEUE ITEMS + SCAFFOLD TA GUIDE PUBLISH: (a) Rename crypto-wallet-security-guide-2026 → crypto-wallet-security-token-approvals-guide to match slug. (b) Scaffold restaking-comparison page.tsx. (c) Promote crypto-technical-analysis-guide-2026 from PUBLISH_QUEUE. Clearing these empties the queue and gets high-value content into the publish pipeline.
